harness.context_description:
This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.

timing_breakdown.action: Two men load the Compaq back into the Eagle

full_prompt:
Context: This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.. Film stock: 35mm film grain. Color palette: cinematic. Lighting: cinematic. Era: modern. Mood: neutral. wide shot. 0:00-0:05: Two men load the Compaq back into the Eagle.
composite_prompt: Background: 4. **The office**: the narrator's regular workplace mentioned as a comparison point, where the test subjects were less representative of the general public than the mall crowd., AMC Eagle - early 1980s four-wheel-drive station wagon, elevated ride height, available in rust/brown tones
